goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'warkworth house'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have internet'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'saturday'.
The train should 'arrive by 17:00' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'price', and 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called warkworth house
Make sure you get whether they have internet
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on saturday
The train should arrive by 17:00 and should go to london liverpool street
Make sure you get train ID, price, and departure time
